political.s: Intuitive Surgical shows moderate bipartisan engagement. FEC data indicates left-leaning political donations (7.5% Republican, 92.5% Democratic ratio) with $0 nominal FEC raised. OpenSecrets shows $128,119 in contributions and $330,000 in lobbying in 2024, suggesting sophisticated federal affairs management focused on healthcare policy matters.

charity.s: Intuitive Surgical demonstrates strong charitable commitment through the Intuitive Foundation. The company contributed $45 million in 2025, bringing total foundation contributions to over $170 million since 2018. Focus areas include medical research, STEM education, surgical fellowships, and global surgical training programs, particularly supporting low-resource settings.
charity.amt: $45 million annually (2025 gift) / $170 million total since 2018
charity.focus: Medical research, STEM education, surgical fellowships, healthcare training, global surgical education

environment.s: Intuitive Surgical maintains ISO 14001:2015 environmental management system certification and reports annual sustainability data. The company shows commitment to continuous environmental improvement through formal EMS implementation, though specific carbon reduction targets and detailed climate performance metrics are not prominently disclosed in public communications.

labor.s: Employee reviews show generally positive sentiment with 4.1/5 Glassdoor rating and 80% recommendation rate. However, concerns emerge regarding management intensity, rapid scaling challenges, and work-life balance (3.5/5). Benefits are competitive including health insurance, 401(k), tuition assistance, and flexible vacation. Some reports of micromanagement and high-pressure sales culture.

dei.s: Intuitive Surgical actively promotes diversity and inclusion through seven employee resource groups (ERGs) including BLACK, ¡HOLA!, Diverse-Abilities, and PRIDE. The company supports LGBTQ+ healthcare equity, participates in Disability:IN's Equality Index as a top-scoring company, and implements unconscious bias training. However, some internal reviews note that diverse representation remains inconsistent across teams.

animals.s: Not applicable. Intuitive Surgical manufactures surgical robotics systems and does not conduct animal testing as part of its business model.

guns.s: Not applicable. Intuitive Surgical manufactures minimally invasive surgical robotic systems for medical procedures and has no involvement in firearms manufacturing or sales.

privacy.s: Limited public disclosure on data privacy practices. The company collects patient outcome data through its surgical systems and maintains digital health platforms. No major privacy breaches reported, but detailed privacy policies and data protection frameworks are not extensively documented in public sustainability reports.

execPay.s: Executive compensation at Intuitive Surgical shows significant disparity. CEO Dave Rosa received $21 million in 2025 (up 53% from prior year). The CEO-to-median-employee pay ratio stood at 147:1 in 2025, up from 153:1 in 2024 but substantially higher than 81:1 in 2022, indicating growing inequality despite company profitability.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
